name: oyon
description: Local facial-expression analytics for browser-based learning simulations. Camera-side inference with MediaPipe + ONNX Runtime Web; only aggregate windows leave the device. Runs standalone or attaches to a host app.

scripts.test: node tests/aggregation.test.js && node tests/validation.test.js && node tests/local-transport.test.js && node tests/fallback-transport.test.js && node tests/rohy-addon.test.js && node tests/settings.test.js && node tests/logging.test.js && node tests/metrics.test.js && node tests/dynamics.test.js && node tests/runtime-settings.test.js && node tests/transition-network.test.js && node tests/contract.test.js

author: Mohammed Saqr
